name: Mojito jug
description: A refreshing group-size mojito made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, lime, mint, simple syrup, and soda water. Real mojitos are made with BACARDÍ. Press some mint and lime, then pour in BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum and club soda for a refreshing Cuban classic.
recipe_steps: Combine the first three ingredients together in a punch bowl with torn mint leaves.
Pour mix over crushed ice in individual highball glasses.
Garnish with a mint sprig and a lime wedge.
searchable_text: Mojito jug main rum BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum A refreshing group-size mojito made with BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, lime, mint, simple syrup, and soda water. Real mojitos are made with BACARDÍ. Press some mint and lime, then pour in BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum and club soda for a refreshing Cuban classic. ingredients 300 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, 150 ml lime juice, 112.5 ml simple syrup, mint leaves, top with soda water recipe steps Combine the first three ingredients together in a punch bowl with torn mint leaves. Pour mix over crushed ice in individual highball glasses. Top each with club soda. Garnish with a mint sprig and a lime wedge.
